chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-583 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA No.1224/2025. 3. For hearing of case. 01.12.2025 None present for the petitioner. There is no intimation. As per the contents of the memo of petition, after lodgment of FIR No. 306/2025 under Section 395 PPC at Police Station Qazi Ahmed, the case was challaned and is presently pending adjudication before the learned Additional Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad. However, in the instant petition, the petitioner has sought recovery of the vehicle as well as arrest of the accused persons. The case is pending before the trial Court; as such, it is the function of the trial Court to proceed in accordance with law. The trial Court is directed to ensure the arrest of the accused persons and the recovery of the vehicle allegedly snatched from the petitioner in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
